new_fixes_this_run.description: DURATION_H_BUG resolved: 3-site code fix for hold_time_s=0 issue that neutered HoldTimeRuleManager.
new_fixes_this_run.expected_impact: HoldTimeRuleManager 3h minimum now enforceable in backtest. hold_time_s no longer 0 for same-candle closes. opened_at set correctly so should_block_early_exit() now fires.

run126_note: Run 126: DURATION_H_BUG CODE FIX APPLIED (92% conf, 13-run escalation resolved). 3 files changed. HYPE_SHORT_VETO_SPLIT escalated to AWAITING_HUMAN_APPROVAL after 8 consecutive runs at 71%. RR_GEOMETRY_FIX deferred — parameter path ambiguous (HYPE SymbolProfile already has atr_mult_sl=2.0, contradicting graduated_rules 'from 1.0' description; needs live data to clarify). BOT_RESTART 59th consecutive flag (73 days offline).

skipped_this_run.reason: BELOW_THRESHOLD: confidence=71% < 75%. Escalated to AWAITING_HUMAN_APPROVAL in graduated_rules.json after 8 consecutive runs. Manual approval recommended.
skipped_this_run.description: Refine hype_short_veto_v1 to target HYPE SHORT >=75% conf only. HYPE SHORT <75% conf shows +$10.09/trade positive EV (n=80, 100d backtest). Current blanket veto loses +$808 every 100 days.
skipped_this_run.escalation_note: 8 consecutive runs at 71%. AWAITING_HUMAN_APPROVAL status set in graduated_rules.json.

skipped_this_run.reason: PARAMETER_AMBIGUITY: graduated_rules says 'from 1.0 to 1.5' but HYPE SymbolProfile already shows atr_mult_sl=2.0 in trading_config.py. Root parameter unclear. Deferred until live SL width data available after bot restart.
skipped_this_run.note: HYPE atr_mult_sl=2.0 in SymbolProfile — may already be applied or may not be used in all SL calc paths. Cannot safely change without knowing effective SL width.

skipped_this_run.reason: ANALYSIS_REQUIRED — temporal split of 965-trade dataset needed before acting
skipped_this_run.description: 100d backtest (conf 80-90% = 40% WR) contradicts full 965-trade dataset (60.2% WR). Need date-split analysis.
Bot offline 73 days. All feedback loops frozen. No live learning possible.

already_applied: DURATION_H_BUG: 3-site code fix applied Run126. hold_time_s now has 60s floor. opened_at patched in backtest engine.
tod_morning_edge_v1 DISABLED (Run 120): underlying insight invalidated at 96% conf. Live morning WR=28%.
sol_long_veto_v1 DEACTIVATED (Run 101): SOL LONG 73.1% WR confirmed
HYPE_SL_ATR_WIDEN: added to graduated_rules.json as PENDING_DEV_FIX (Run 123)

deferred_code_changes.description: Widen HYPE SL. Ambiguity: graduated_rules says 'from 1.0 to 1.5' but SymbolProfile already shows atr_mult_sl=2.0. Need live data to determine actual effective SL width before changing config.

candidates_this_run.description: Split hype_short_veto_v1 into two targeted rules: block HYPE SHORT >=75% conf (31.2% WR, -$70/trade), allow HYPE SHORT <75% conf at 50% size (55% WR, +$10.09/trade).
candidates_this_run.escalation_note: 8 consecutive runs at 71%. Escalated to AWAITING_HUMAN_APPROVAL in graduated_rules.json.
